## Capability shape

What semantic tool should the model see?

```text
domain.action_name(...)
```

## Database shape

- Engine: Postgres / MySQL
- Table or view:
- Primary key:
- Tenant/scope key:
- Conflict/version column:
- Visible fields:
- Proposed writable fields:

## Safety expectation

Should this be read-only, guarded one-row writeback, or app-owned executor
writeback?

## Example request

What would the user ask the agent to do?
